introSection: Kukomotív was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Vidámpark in Budapest, Hungary.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Caterpillar.

fullText:
Kukomotív was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Vidámpark in Budapest, Hungary.



Yellow track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Caterpillar.
